should_trigger.query: Draft an email to my manager asking for approval to hire a contractor
should_trigger.rationale: Direct request to draft a business email (Action / Decision type)

should_trigger.query: Review and improve this email before I send it to the client
should_trigger.rationale: Explicit request to review and improve a business email (Mode B)

should_trigger.query: Turn this Slack message into a formal email to the team
Help me write a cold email to an investor
should_trigger.rationale: Cold Outreach type — explicitly mentions emailing an investor

should_trigger.query: I need to introduce two people over email, what's the right way?
How do I say no to this project request politely over email?
should_trigger.rationale: Refusal / Rejection type — declining via email

should_trigger.query: This email I got is really vague, how do I ask for clarification?
should_trigger.rationale: Clarification Request type — punting a vague email back

should_trigger.query: Improve the subject line of this email
should_trigger.rationale: Email revision focusing on subject line structure

should_trigger.query: Draft a status update for the exec team on the migration

should_not_trigger.query: Write a marketing newsletter for our 10k subscribers
should_not_trigger.rationale: Bulk marketing email, not structured one-to-one business communication

should_not_trigger.query: Set up an SMTP server for our app
should_not_trigger.rationale: Email infrastructure / coding task, not email writing

should_not_trigger.query: Reply to this customer support ticket about a refund
should_not_trigger.rationale: Customer support ticket response, excluded by the description

should_not_trigger.query: Write a personal note to my friend about the weekend
Parse this email attachment and extract the invoice data
should_not_trigger.rationale: Data extraction / coding task, not email drafting or review

should_not_trigger.query: Fix the bug in our email rendering component
should_not_trigger.rationale: Code bug fix, not email writing
